title: pombalia wrightii
intro: Pombalia wrightii, also known as Wright's pombalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Pombalia wrightii lie in its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, and herbal preparations often involve infusions of the roots or leaves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
